rationale: Reduce Windows CLI arg-length risk by centralizing a short-arg policy in a procedural JSON file without touching code.

edits.content:
{
  "schema": "brainflow.cli_arglen_policy.v1",
  "max_cli_arg_chars": 6000,
  "prefer_file_payload": true,
  "prefer_env_payload": true,
  "notes": "Keep CLI args short on Windows; pass large payloads via temp file or env var when possible."
}

risks: File may be unused until code reads it; no immediate behavioral change.
expected_benefit: Provides a documented, low-risk policy stub to guide future CLI payload handling and reduce arg-length failures.
